metrics.name: MTD
metrics.description: Month-to-Date total or average of a metric, calculated from the start of the current month up to the current date.
metrics.calculation: Sum or average of the metric where date >= first day of current month and date <= today
metrics.example: If transactions in Feb are [100, 200, 150], MTD sum = 450, MTD avg = 150

metrics.name: Average Balance
metrics.description: Average balance of an account over a given period.
metrics.calculation: Sum of daily balances divided by number of days in the period

metrics.name: Hourly Average
metrics.description: Average value of a metric per hour.
metrics.calculation: Sum of metric values in an hour divided by number of records in that hour

metrics.name: Daily Average
metrics.description: Average value of a metric per day.
metrics.calculation: Sum of metric values in a day divided by number of records in that day

metrics.name: Average
metrics.description: Average value of a metric over a specified period.
metrics.calculation: Sum of metric values in the period divided by number of records in that period

metrics.name: YTD
metrics.description: Year-to-Date total or average of a metric, calculated from Jan 1 of current year up to the current date.
metrics.calculation: Sum or average of the metric where date >= Jan 1 of current year and date <= today
metrics.example: If transactions from Jan 1 to today = [100,200,150], YTD sum = 450, YTD avg = 150

metrics.name: Rolling Average
metrics.description: Average of a metric over a sliding window of recent N periods (days, hours, etc.)
metrics.calculation: For a window size N, Rolling Avg at time T = sum(metric values in last N periods)/N
